# Complete MCP tool generation test

# Generate a full MCP tool description with hints for a complex function
exec sourcereflect -func ComplexOperation -analyze-hints -pretty complex_func.go
stdout '"name": "ComplexOperation"'
stdout '"inputSchema"'
stdout '"hints"'
stdout '"readOnlyHint": false'
stdout '"destructiveHint": true'
stdout '"openWorldHint": true'

-- complex_func.go --
package main

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

// ComplexOperation fetches data from a URL and saves it to a file
func ComplexOperation(url string, outputFile string) error {
	// Fetch data from network
	resp, err := http.Get(url)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	defer resp.Body.Close()
	
	// Parse JSON response
	var data map[string]interface{}
	if err := json.NewDecoder(resp.Body).Decode(&data); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	
	// Write to file
	jsonData, err := json.MarshalIndent(data, "", "  ")
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	
	return os.WriteFile(outputFile, jsonData, 0644)
}
